zh.Coupar Angus Abbey: 英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯庫帕爾 安格斯庫帕爾 安格斯 艾比 斯科特蘭
zh.lifeSummary: 當Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife於1262年出生在英國蘇格蘭費伏梅爾時，他的父親Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife17歲，母親Lady Anne Durward21歲。他和Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1289年9月25日在英國蘇格蘭享年27歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭培斯 安德 金洛斯庫帕爾 安格斯庫帕爾 安格斯 艾比 斯科特蘭。

zh-hans.Coupar Angus Abbey: 英国苏格兰培斯 安德 金洛斯庫帕爾 安格斯庫帕爾 安格斯 艾比 斯科特蘭
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife于1262年出生在英国苏格兰費伏梅爾时，他的父亲Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife17岁，母亲Lady Anne Durward21岁。他和Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1289年9月25日在英国苏格兰享年27岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰培斯 安德 金洛斯庫帕爾 安格斯庫帕爾 安格斯 艾比 斯科特蘭。

nameMeanings.name: MacDuff
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDuff
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Duibh, a patronymic from the personal name or byname Dubh ‘black, dark-haired, swarthy’. Compare Duff .

nameMeanings.name: Duncan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

variants.name: Donnchadh
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

en.lifeSummary: When Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife was born in 1262, in Methil, Fife, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife, was 17 and his mother, Lady Anne Durward, was 21. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife. He died on 25 September 1289, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 27, and was buried in Coupar Angus Abbey Scotland, Coupar Angus, Perth and Kinross, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.Coupar Angus Abbey: Coupar Angus Abbey Scotland, Coupar Angus, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife est né en 1262, à Methil, Fife, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Durward, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife. Il est décédé le 25 septembre 1289, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterré à Coupar Angus Abbey Scotland, Coupar Angus, Perth and Kinross, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.Coupar Angus Abbey: Coupar Angus Abbey Scotland, Coupar Angus, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife 1262 in Methil, Fife, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife 17 und seine Mutter Lady Anne Durward 21. Er hatte mit Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. September 1289 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Coupar Angus Abbey Scotland, Coupar Angus, Perth and Kinross, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife è nato il nel 1262 nel Methil, Fife, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne Durward, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife. Morì il 25 settembre 1289, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolto a Coupar Angus Abbey Scotland, Coupar Angus, Perth and Kinross, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fifeが1262年にイギリススコットランドフィフメスイルで生まれた時，父Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fifeは17歳，母Lady Anne Durwardは21歳であった。彼はLady Joan de Clare Countess of Fifeとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1289年9月25日にイギリススコットランドで27歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドペルス アンド キンロスコウパー アンガスコウパー アンガス アビー スコトランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Coupar Angus Abbey: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 코우파르 앤구스 코우파르 앤구스 애브브이 스컷랜드
ko.lifeSummary: Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife(이)가 1262년 영국 스코틀랜드 피프 멧힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne Durward(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1289년 9월 25일 영국 스코틀랜드에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 코우파르 앤구스 코우파르 앤구스 애브브이 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.Coupar Angus Abbey: Coupar Angus Abbey Scotland, Coupar Angus, Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife nasceu em 1262, em Methil, Fife, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Durward, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife. Ele faleceu em 25 de setembro de 1289, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 27 anos, e foi sepultado em Coupar Angus Abbey Scotland, Coupar Angus, Perth and Kinross, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.Coupar Angus Abbey: коупар ангус эбби скотланд, коупар ангус, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Duncan MacDuff 9th Earl of Fife родился в 1262 г. в местности метил, фиф, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Mormaer Colban MacDuff 8th Earl of Fife было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Durward, 21. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Lady Joan de Clare Countess of Fife. Он умер 25 сентября 1289 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет и был похоронен в местности коупар ангус эбби скотланд, коупар ангус, пирт анд кинросс, Шотландия, Великобритания.
